message:
fix(db): correct TrackedTransaction lifetime elision in queries.rs

Remove unnecessary `&'conn` reference wrapper on the `Connection`
associated type bound. The `DbConn` type already implements
`Connection` directly, so `<crate::DbConn as Connection>::Tx<'conn>`
is the correct form. The previous `<&'conn crate::DbConn as Connection>`
form relied on a blanket impl that may not exist for all backends.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
